findings.description: The sanitization regex snippet in design.md Decision 5 is incomplete compared to the 15 patterns defined in observability/spec.md (e.g., AWS, GitHub, Slack, and Google patterns are missing from the design doc snippet).
findings.resolution: Update the _PATTERNS snippet in design.md to align with the authoritative list in the specification.

findings.description: Regex pattern 15 in the specification includes 'api[_-]?key' in the catch-all, but the corresponding pattern in the design document snippet is missing this variant.
findings.resolution: Synchronize the catch-all regex pattern between the specification and design documents.

findings.description: There is a potential conflict between the 'zero-allocation/no-op' requirement for NoopProvider and the specification requirement that it MUST raise ValueError for invalid tool_kind or op values.
findings.resolution: Clarify in Decision 7 of the design document that NoopProvider still performs enum validation on input parameters to ensure contract compliance, even while maintaining a zero-allocation posture for valid calls.

findings.description: While LANGFUSE_SAMPLE_RATE is included in the TelemetryConfig and mentioned in the configuration requirement, its implementation behavior (e.g., whether sampling happens at the factory or within the provider) is not specified.
findings.resolution: Add a note to the LangfuseProvider implementation details in design.md clarifying that sampling is handled internally by the provider during span creation.
